import os

import torch

# Set Hugging Face cache directory to a location with more space

print("Model cached successfully!")

# Test that everything works

print("\nAlbert model and tokenizer have been cached successfully!")
print("You can now use them offline by specifying 'albert/albert-base-v2' as the model name.")
EOF
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ]
}
